PropertyList.name: CorrActions DEFAULT
PropertyList.description: Welcome to CorrActions Flight! This tutorial starts above Hilo Intl Airport (PHTO) in the northeast of Hawaii, in clear, still, weather. Keep north heading at around 2000 feet. Maintain speed of 500 knots. Hit targets horizontally at the target mark in north direction. This Scenario announces if you hit or miss.

step.message: Keep heading north at around 2000 feet. Maintain speed of 500 knots. Hit targets horizontally at the target mark.

nasal.script: # sivaks: on starting scenario show dialog to get pilot data fgcommand("dialog-show", props.Node.new({"dialog-name": "sivaks_pilot_info_dlg"}));

error.message: You are too low. Keep 2000 feet.
You are too high. Keep 2000 feet.

step.message: Congratulations, you've finished CorrActions training flight.
